mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_operation_log ( user_id, user_name, operation_type, operation_module, operation_desc, request_method, request_url, request_params, response_code, response_msg, operation_time, ip_address, user_agent, exception_msg, is_success, is_del ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userName}, #{operationType}, #{operationModule}, #{operationDesc}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestUrl}, #{requestParams}, #{responseCode}, #{responseMsg}, #{operationTime}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, #{exceptionMsg}, #{isSuccess}, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_operation_log SET is_del = 1 WHERE log_id IN
#{logId}
